title: Youtube Poop - You want it?
description:
My first youtube poop, but I put a lot of effort into it. Contains some.. different material from the usual in Zelda CD-I. 

Made using Adobe Premiere.

Songs in order:
Wang Chun - Everybody Have Fun Tonight
Falco - Rock Me Amadeus

#morshu
